title: CobbleKanto Core
description: The core support mod for the CobbleKanto modpack, powering legendary events, puzzles and utility commands.
body:
# CobbleKanto Core **CobbleKanto Core** is the main support mod used by the **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** modpack. This is not the full **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** modpack by itself. It is the internal core mod that helps power some of the custom systems used across the project, including special encounter tools, puzzle logic, legendary receiver events, utility commands, and a few server-side QoL systems made for the **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** experience. If you are playing the official **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** modpack, you normally do not need to install this manually. It is mainly published so the core mod can be tracked, updated, and used as part of the full modpack setup. --- [![CobbleKanto Shockbyte sponsor banner](https://i.imgur.com/tq6K5R4.png)](https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10741) Get 25% off your Minecraft server with Shockbyte! Ready to start an epic adventure with your friends? Just click [here](https://shockbyte.com/billing/aff.php?aff=10741) or on the banner and use promo code “COBBLEKANTO”, plus you’ll be helping us keep improving the modpack and developing future projects! --- ## What It Does It brings together several custom systems that were created for the **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** map and multiplayer adventure flow. Some of these features are useful for admins and map makers, while others are meant to quietly support the modpack in the background. This includes things like: - legendary receiver blocks and orb based activation - internal map puzzle systems - special gym interaction logic - mount configuration commands - night vision handling for exploration - shiny capture notifications - custom utility blocks The mod is best understood as the “core layer” behind CobbleKanto’s custom adventure mechanics. --- ## For Players If you are downloading the full **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** modpack, you usually do not need to think about this mod separately. CobbleKanto Core is included to make the modpack’s custom systems work correctly. Removing it from the modpack can break custom spawns, legendary events, puzzles, GUI screens, utility commands, or other map-specific behavior. In short: ```txt Playing the CobbleKanto modpack? Keep this installed. ``` --- ## For Server Owners CobbleKanto Core contains systems that were made with multiplayer adventure servers in mind. Some features are designed to help admins control or tune the server experience, such as: - mount behavior - special encounter zones - shiny capture announcements - puzzle resets - legendary receiver setup - controlled spawner configuration Because this mod is tied closely to CobbleKanto’s map logic, it is recommended to use it as part of the intended **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** modpack environment unless you are comfortable configuring custom adventure systems yourself. --- ## For Map Makers Some systems inside CobbleKanto Core can be useful for map makers building controlled adventure areas. Legendary Receivers can be tied to custom events or commands. Gym puzzle systems can be used to create more interactive map moments. That said, this mod was not designed as a generic public API. It is a core mod for CobbleKanto first, and a toolkit second. If you want smaller standalone versions of some systems, check the related CobbleKanto project mods. --- ## Legendary Receivers CobbleKanto Core includes a Legendary Receiver block and orb items used for special encounter events. These systems are designed for controlled legendary or unique map encounters. A receiver can be configured with a key, and the correct orb is required to activate it. Included orb items: - Articuno - Zapdos - Moltres - Mewtwo - Mew - Snorlax male - Snorlax female - --- ## Gym and Puzzle Systems CobbleKanto Core includes internal logic for some map-specific puzzle and gym mechanics. Current systems include: - Lt. Surge-style switch/trashcan puzzle logic - Blaine Gym question binding and reload tools These systems are built around the **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** adventure map and may require configuration files or map-specific setup to be useful outside the official pack. --- ## Utility Commands CobbleKanto Core includes several admin-facing commands used to manage project systems. Examples include command groups for: - mount settings - night vision toggle - special spawn command helpers - shiny notification toggle - legendary receiver setup - Lt. Surge puzzle reset/debug - Blaine Gym binding/reload These commands are mainly intended for server admins and map setup. --- ## Night Vision CobbleKanto Core includes a night vision helper designed for the CobbleKanto exploration experience. It can keep night vision refreshed for players and also allows admins to toggle it off for individual players when needed. This helps keep dark areas readable while still allowing specific areas or moments to behave differently. --- ## Shiny Notifications When enabled, CobbleKanto Core can announce when a player captures a shiny Cobblemon. This is mostly a server/community feature, meant to make rare captures feel more exciting in multiplayer. --- ## Dependencies Required: - Minecraft 1.21.1 - Fabric Loader - Fabric API - Java 21 - Cobblemon - GeckoLib Recommended: - The official **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** modpack environment Some systems may also interact with other CobbleKanto ecosystem mods or datapack/config content when used inside the full modpack. --- ## FAQ **Is this the full CobbleKanto modpack?** No. This is the core mod used by the CobbleKanto modpack. The full experience requires the full modpack. **Can I use this outside CobbleKanto?** Some systems may work outside the official modpack, but this mod was built primarily for CobbleKanto. Standalone use is recommended only for advanced server owners or map makers who understand the configuration needs. **Does this replace KantoSpawners, KantoBlocks, or KantoModels?** No. CobbleKanto Core is the main support mod for the modpack. Other standalone mods may provide cleaner, focused versions of specific systems or asset sets. **Can I use this in my own map, server or content?** Yes. You can use it in maps, servers, modpacks, screenshots, videos, livestreams, and showcases, as long as you do not reupload or claim the mod/assets as your own. --- ## Notes - This mod is designed for the **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** modpack. - It is not meant to be a general-purpose library mod. - Some systems are map-specific and may not be useful without the CobbleKanto environment. - Server owners should test configs carefully before using it outside the official pack. - Future Cobblemon updates may require compatibility updates. --- ## Credits CobbleKanto Core exists because the **[CobbleKanto](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblekanto)** project needed custom systems that could not be handled by map building alone. Special thanks to the Cobblemon community and to everyone following the CobbleKanto project. ---

CobbleKanto Core is an unofficial fan-made Minecraft mod.

This project is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or approved by Mojang Studios, Microsoft, Nintendo, Game Freak, Creatures Inc., The Pokémon Company, Cobblemon, or CobbledStudios.

Minecraft is a trademark of Microsoft Corporation. Pokémon and related names are trademarks of their respective owners. Cobblemon belongs to its respective creators.
